summary: The team faces a difficult challenge, with some members expressing fear, prompting Hajin to boldly volunteer to go first. He demonstrates incredible skill by strategically eliminating Cadet Kim Byungho with a ricochet shot and later single-handedly defeating six opponents, leaving his teammates astonished. Rachel is discovered alive, holding a powerful relic, as she grapples with rumors about Hajin and her commitment to duty over personal emotions. Hajin's unexpected prowess leads the team to re-evaluate his capabilities and redirect their focus to someone in need on underground Floor 6.
key_moments: Hajin volunteers to take on a challenge, facing initial fear from his teammates.
Hajin strategically eliminates Cadet Kim Byungho with a ricochet shot, leading to his disqualification.
Rachel is found alive, possessing a relic, while contemplating her duty and emotions amidst rumors about Hajin.
Hajin defeats six opponents alone, surprising his team and earning their admiration for his strength.
The team realizes there is someone in need of help on underground Floor 6.
